title: Xerid Intense Post-Workout Russian Bamboo Shoot Tagine
description: A rich and savory post-workout dish featuring fermented bamboo shoots in a Russian-inspired clay tagine. Perfect for a satisfying and protein-packed meal.

ingredients.name: Bamboo Shoots
ingredients.notes: raw, sashimi-cut, fermented in rice vinegar

instructions: In a clay tagine or Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the caraway seeds and dried dill, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the sashimi-cut bamboo shoots and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly browned.
Add the fermented vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook for 15-20 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
Stir in the freshly squeezed lemon juice and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve the Xerid Intense Post-Workout Russian Bamboo Shoot Tagine hot, garnished with additional dill and lemon wedges if desired.
